description: Lock the 2026-06-24 rescope of salted_trade_provisions to Roman salted fish and fish-sauce products, not broad third-millennium BCE salted provisions or market weighing infrastructure.

checks.reason: The node is now source-anchored to Roman-period salted fish and fish-sauce trade rather than the prior unsourced -3000 global provisions claim.
Portable balance scales are market infrastructure, not a direct prerequisite for Roman salted-fish preservation and trade.
Salting and related preservation methods are the relevant enabling capability for Roman salted-fish products.
The scoped technology is distributed through Roman Mediterranean markets, making trade routes an enabler rather than weighing equipment.
